etymology.description: Original form of ็นผ(็นผ) (jรฌ, "continue") -> Phonetic ใกญ(ใกญ) (jรฌ) + semantic ็ณธ(็ณธ) (mรฌ, "silk; thread")
etymology.interpretation: The character ใกญ is an ancient form of ็นผ(็นผ) (jรฌ, "continue") used as the phonetic component in the compound with ็ณธ(็ณธ) (mรฌ, "silk; thread"), emphasizing the concept of continuation through the imagery of weaving or connecting threads.
